    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Admin
    Administrator user with full system management privileges.
    CitationsComparator
     
    Course
     
    CreditLimitExceededException
     
    DataStorage
    Central data storage for the university system.
    DateComparator
     
    Employee
    Abstract base class for all university employees.
    Faculty
     
    LengthComparator
     
    Lesson
     
    LessonType
     
    LowHIndexException
     
    Main
     
    Manager
    Manager employee with administrative academic duties.
    ManagerType
     
    Mark
     
    Message
    Represents a message sent between two users in the system.
    MessageSystem
    Manages messaging between users in the university system.
    NotAResearcherException
     
    Researcher
    Interface representing a researcher in the university system.
    ResearcherDecorator
    Decorator that adds Researcher functionality to any User.
    ResearchPaper
    Represents a scientific research paper.
    ResearchProject
    Represents a university research project.
    Student
    Represents a bachelor student in the university system.
    Teacher
    Represents a university teacher.
    TeacherTitle
     
    Transcript
     
    UniversitySystem
     
    UniversitySystemException
     
    User
    Abstract base class for all users in the university system.
    UserFactory
    Factory class for creating User instances by type.
    UserType
